def negative_linear_membership_test_in_loop_over_large_static_list():
    rule_id = "linear_membership_test_in_loop_over_large_static_list"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Membership test `in list` used inside a loop; convert to a set for O(1) lookup."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
